siteUrl.description: Base URL of your Jira Cloud site, e.g., https://your-domain.atlassian.net

projectKey.description: Jira project key to monitor, e.g., ENG

specificAssignee.description: If set, the connector will stop as soon as a newly assigned issue is assigned to this user. Recommended to use accountId.

assigneeMatchField.description: Which assignee field to compare against specificAssignee. Cloud recommends accountId. emailAddress may be restricted by privacy settings.

maxResultsPerPoll.description: Max issues to fetch per page in each poll.

jqlExtra.description: Optional extra JQL to AND into the query (e.g., 'issuetype = Bug AND priority in (High, Highest)').

fieldsMode.description: Fields parameter for Jira search. Use '*all' to return all fields.
